title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4 - 9 - 2017: I cracked, gotta get in shape

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog shirtless, explaining that physical pain (back and arm numbness from sitting) made him realize he needs to get in shape. He announces a new personal regimen he calls 'smoke bike' — getting high and cycling — and considers eventually signing up for an Ironman triathlon.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has been neglecting his body and now feels compelled to start getting fit
Willing to deprioritize or abandon current website project to focus on riding and health
Views weed positively — calls it pure and strong, plans to smoke heavily as part of his new routine
Thinks he could do one even while out of shape, just for fun
